title: Deep Diver into US-India Rift: Why Washington Is Quietly Strangling Its Key Ally India • Mohan Sonti
description:
This in-depth analysis by Mohan Sonti exposes a calculated yet largely unspoken strategy by Washington to quietly constrain India’s strategic and economic potential—not through open confrontation, but via regulatory warfare, export controls, and managed technology dependence.

As the US-India partnership is publicly celebrated, this discussion examines what is happening beneath the surface: selective policy pressure, gatekeeping of critical technologies, and narrative engineering that seeks to limit New Delhi’s strategic autonomy while maintaining the appearance of alliance.

This episode is especially relevant for policy circles in Washington DC, strategic analysts, and the far-right MAGA ecosystem that increasingly blames Indian-Americans for America’s economic and technological anxieties—often without evidence, but with growing political consequence.

A must-watch for anyone tracking:
• US-India relations
• Strategic autonomy vs alliance politics
• Technology controls and regulatory leverage
• The shifting power balance in global geopolitics 
#USIndiaRift #IndiaUSRelations #StrategicAutonomy #Geopolitics #WashingtonPlaybook #IndiaFirst #GlobalPowerShift #MohanSonti

title: Bharat’s Energy Sources & Challenges: Can We Overcome Them? • Mohan Sonti
description:
Bharat’s growing energy needs are at the core of its economic rise. But where does our energy come from, and what challenges do we face in meeting future demand?

In this discussion, Mohan Sonti breaks down:
♦ India’s energy mix – coal, oil, natural gas, renewables, and nuclear.
♦ The geopolitical risks of energy dependence.
♦ The renewable push – solar, wind, hydro, and green hydrogen.
♦ Infrastructure and policy bottlenecks.
♦ Can Bharat truly achieve energy independence?

This is not just about resources – it’s about Bharat’s future as a global power.
#BharatEnergy #MohanSonti #EnergyCrisis #Renewables #IndiaFuture #Geopolitics

title: The Real History of Kashmir • How a King's Kindness Changed Its Religion Forever • Mohan Sonti
description:
Was Kashmir always Islamic? What really happened between the 10th and 19th century?
In this eye-opening episode, Mohan Sonti dives deep into the forgotten pages of Kashmir’s real history — from its Hindu roots and flourishing temples to the slow but complete religious transformation into an Islamic state.

Discover how one king’s act of tolerance and generosity inadvertently led to irreversible cultural change. This is not just a story of conquest — it’s a story of faith, politics, and fate.

👉 Watch now to understand the critical turning points that changed the destiny of Kashmir forever.
#KashmirHistory #MohanSonti #HinduToIslam #RealHistoryOfKashmir #ForgottenIndia #IslamInKashmir #KashmirFacts #AncientIndia #IndianHistory #ReligiousConversions

title: WAQF or WAKF - How it has become a Monster • Mohan Sonti
description:
The Wakf Act has been around for over 100 years and has got some overreaching powers which would wreak havoc on India. A one-stop-video that can serve as a reference for all you need to know about the Wakf act. Please watch till the end to understand the importance of the 2024 Amendment, with Mohan Krishna Sonti.
